description:
**Source:** CMO report P2-001 (P2 — MEDIUM, fix within 60 days)
**Assigned to Jake for review before agent pickup.**

**Problem:** GitHub README is the first touchpoint for most developers. Current README lacks visual polish and quick-start clarity needed to convert visitors into users.

**Action:**
1. Add hero banner/logo at top
2. Add badge row (npm version, build status, license, bundle size)
3. Add 1-command quick-start install (`npm install helixir`)
4. Add screenshot or GIF showing the tooling in action
5. Add clear link to documentation
6. Add "Why HELiXiR" section with 3-4 bullet differentiators

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] README has visual hierarchy (banner, badges, quick-start, docs link)
- [ ] Quick-start is copy-paste functional (tested)
- [ ] Links to documentation work
- [ ] Badge row reflects real npm package data
title: P2-001: Optimize HELiXiR GitHub README as a landing page
